items.name: jiguang132/storyai-3d-director-desk
items.full_text: A browser-based 3D director desk demo built with React, Vite, and Three.js.

items.name: olemeyer/rocketplaneIO
items.full_text: Self-hosted AI SRE for Kubernetes — zero-instrumentation eBPF observability plus a copilot that fixes issues through guardrailed, self-verifying actions. BYO-LLM, air-gapped capable.

items.name: shaohua-pan/StarWAM
items.full_text: A Generalizable Codebase for World-Action Models

items.name: shlokkhemani/rabbithole
items.full_text: An infinite canvas for learning — select text, ask, and answers branch out as documents. MCP server for Claude Code, Codex, and any agent.

items.name: ninjahawk/Subtext
items.full_text: To know what models don't say out loud.

items.name: l0ng-ai/tty7
items.full_text: A GPU-rendered, daemon-backed terminal in pure Rust. Built on Zed's gpui and Alacritty's VT core.

items.name: markfulton/claude-antigravity-agents
items.full_text: A Claude Code skill that delegates coding, review, analysis, and research jobs to Google Antigravity CLI (agy) sub-agents — save tokens, use a second model, work in parallel.
